title: Horror+
description: A horror modpack that aims to be playable with some horror additions.
body:
This modpack is meant to be difficult. I am not going to say anything about the modpack other than this; build your house underground.


**VR SUPPORT!!!** You are able to hook up your vr and play this modpack!!
  
_____________________________________________________
  **Mod list:**
